title: VSB STB - Software Update Lifecycle
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Internet connection is available. Remote is paired and responsive. Test environment supports checking or triggering STB or app software update behavior. Current software version is known before testing.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar

steps.step: Record current software or app version
steps.expectedResult: Current version information is visible and can be recorded

steps.step: Check for available software update if supported
steps.expectedResult: System checks for available update or displays current update state

steps.data: Only perform when an update is available or can be triggered in the test environment

steps.step: Wait for update download to complete
steps.expectedResult: Update download completes successfully or expected progress is shown

steps.step: Wait for update installation to complete
Allow STB to restart if required
steps.expectedResult: STB restarts automatically or prompts for restart as expected

steps.step: Wait for STB to boot after update
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected startup screen is displayed
User remains logged in or is shown the expected login/profile screen

steps.step: Verify software or app version after update
steps.expectedResult: Version is updated when an update was installed, or remains unchanged when no update was available

steps.step: Start live TV playback after update
Verify settings are available after update
steps.expectedResult: Settings screen opens and expected settings are available
